# Project Plan: File Organization System

## Project Overview
This document outlines the development plan for an AI-powered file organization system that will help users automatically categorize and manage their digital files.

## Objectives
1. Develop intelligent file analysis capabilities
2. Implement smart folder creation and management
3. Provide semantic search functionality
4. Ensure privacy-first design with local AI processing
5. Support multiple file formats and types

## Timeline
- Phase 1 (Weeks 1-4): Core file analysis engine
- Phase 2 (Weeks 5-8): AI integration and smart categorization
- Phase 3 (Weeks 9-12): User interface and experience
- Phase 4 (Weeks 13-16): Testing, optimization, and deployment

## Resources Required
- Development team: 3 engineers
- AI/ML specialist: 1 expert
- UI/UX designer: 1 designer
- QA engineer: 1 tester
- Budget: $150,000

## Technical Stack
- Backend: Rust for performance and memory safety
- AI: Local Ollama integration
- Database: SQLite for local storage
- Frontend: Modern web technologies
- Desktop: Tauri framework

## Risk Assessment
- AI model accuracy: Medium risk
- Performance with large file sets: High risk
- User adoption: Medium risk
- Privacy compliance: Low risk

## Success Metrics
- File organization accuracy: >90%
- User satisfaction: >4.5/5
- Processing speed: <5s per file
- Memory usage: <500MB peak

## Next Steps
1. Finalize technical architecture
2. Set up development environment
3. Begin core engine development
4. Weekly progress reviews

---
Document prepared by: Project Management Team
Last updated: 2024-03-15
Version: 1.0
